Just now

--

If you’ve been hearing about Claude everywhere but aren’t sure where to start, this guide is for you.
Press enter or click to view image in full size

Over the past year, Claude has become one of the most talked-about AI models among developers. Whether you’re writing code, building AI agents, analyzing documents, or creating enterprise applications, chances are you’ve seen someone recommend Claude over other models.
At first, I assumed Claude was simply another chatbot competing with ChatGPT or Gemini. But after exploring its ecosystem and building projects around it, I realized Claude is much more than a conversational AI.
Today, Claude has evolved into an entire platform that includes powerful language models, coding tools, APIs, desktop applications, enterprise capabilities, and protocols like the Model Context Protocol (MCP) that allow AI to interact with external tools and systems.
If you’re just getting started, understanding the ecosystem can feel overwhelming. This article is designed to simplify everything and give you a solid foundation before diving into more advanced topics like Claude Code, MCP, AI agents, or Loop Engineering.
What Is Claude?
Claude is a family of Large Language Models (LLMs) developed by Anthropic, an AI…
